debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun k => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) atTop (nhds r)

proof:
simp_rw [mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv, one_mul]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop (0 : ℝ)).mono (fun k hk => inv_ne_zero hk.ne')⟩
successful_attempts:
simp_rw [mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv, one_mul]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop (0 : ℝ)).mono (fun k hk => inv_ne_zero hk.ne')⟩
